DynamicShadows.Setting.BaseOpacity.Name: Base Shadow Opacity
DynamicShadows.Setting.BaseOpacity.Hint: The starting opacity (0 to 1) of the shadow when the token begins to elevate.
DynamicShadows.Setting.MaxElevation.Name: Maximum Elevation
DynamicShadows.Setting.MaxElevation.Hint: The elevation at which the shadow completely fades away.
DynamicShadows.Setting.Azimuth.Name: Sun Azimuth (Direction)
DynamicShadows.Setting.Azimuth.Hint: Compass direction of the sun (0 = North, 90 = East, 180 = South, 270 = West). Shadows cast away from the sun.
DynamicShadows.Setting.Altitude.Name: Sun Altitude (Height)
DynamicShadows.Setting.Altitude.Hint: Height of the sun in the sky (1 = Horizon, 89 = High Noon). Lower altitudes create longer shadows.
DynamicShadows.Setting.MeshOffsetMultipl: How aggressively the token visually moves up the screen per unit of elevation.
DynamicShadows.Setting.AlphaThreshold.Hi: Opacity threshold (0 to 1) for stripping baked-in shadows. Higher values strip more pixels.
DynamicShadows.Setting.RequireStatus.Hin: If enabled, tokens will only visually elevate and cast dynamic shadows if they have an airborne status effect applied. Otherwise, they remain visually grounded.
DynamicShadows.Setting.StatusIds.Name: Airborne Status IDs
DynamicShadows.Setting.StatusIds.Hint: A comma-separated list of system-specific status IDs that trigger visual elevation (e.g., 'fly, hover, levitate'). Defaults to 'fly'.
